mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_drone (model, manufacturer, max_flight_time, max_range, weight, payload_capacity, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{model}, #{manufacturer}, #{maxFlightTime}, #{maxRange}, #{weight}, #{payloadCapacity}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.md.basePlatform.config.mybatis.SqliteLocalDateTimeTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.md.basePlatform.config.mybatis.SqliteLocalDateTimeTypeHandler})
mapper.select: SELECT id, model, manufacturer, max_flight_time, max_range, weight, payload_capacity, created_at, updated_at FROM t_drone WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, model, manufacturer, max_flight_time, max_range, weight, payload_capacity, created_at, updated_at FROM t_drone
(model LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR manufacturer LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_drone
(model LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR manufacturer LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE t_drone SET model = #{model}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, max_flight_time = #{maxFlightTime}, max_range = #{maxRange}, weight = #{weight}, payload_capacity = #{payloadCapacity}, updated_at = #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.md.basePlatform.config.mybatis.SqliteLocalDateTimeTypeHandler} WHERE id = #{id}
